wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Looming Fruit|2}}
{{R|Looming Fruit||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.

== Obtaining Looming Fruit ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3|2}}, can be offered by {{KW|Nonupeipe||2}}.

== Trivia ==
* The amount of max HP gained is equivalent to the {{R|Strawberry||2}}, {{R|Pear||2}}, and {{R|Mango||2}} combined.
* Looming Fruit's name is a reference to the clothing company Fruit of the Loom.
* The sprite used for {{R|Looming Fruit||2}} has a 50% chance to either include or not include a cornucopia. This will always stay the same on a given profile. 
** This is a reference to the [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fruit_of_the_Loom#Logo_misconception Fruit of the Loom logo], which depicts a pile of fruit but is often mistakenly believed to also include a cornucopia.
